title: Endurance bar
description: Endurance bar adds a stamina system to Minecraft.
body:
**Endurance bar** — a mod that adds a new stamina system to Minecraft.

🔋 A stamina bar appears above the hunger bar and is consumed when:

• sprinting

• jumping

• climbing

• other active actions

⏳ When stamina runs out, the character won’t be able to sprint until it regenerates.

**✨ Mod Features:**

• a new Stamina bar above the hunger bar

• smooth stamina regeneration

• balanced for Survival and PvP

• lightweight and optimized code

🎮 The mod makes gameplay more realistic and engaging by adding a new element of energy management for the player.
